attractions.name: Ho Chi Minh Complex
attractions.description: A deeply symbolic area dedicated to Vietnam's founding father. Includes Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, Presidential Palace, Ho Chi Minh's Stilt House, and One Pillar Pagoda

attractions.name: Hanoi Old Quarter
attractions.description: Narrow streets buzzing with daily life, colonial facades, street vendors, and hidden temples. Includes St. Joseph's Cathedral

attractions.name: Hanoi Train Street – Phung Hung
attractions.description: Experience the thrill of the train passing just inches away from cafés lining the tracks

attractions.name: Temple of Literature
attractions.description: First national university in Vietnam, learn about Confucianism history and admire serene gardens
source_files: Vietnam/Vietnam- All Inclusive Guide- Vishnu Prasad.pdf

attractions.name: Hoan Kiem Lake
attractions.description: Iconic lake at the cultural heart of Hanoi with tree-lined pathways and peaceful atmosphere
source_files: Vietnam/Vietnam- All Inclusive Guide- Vishnu Prasad.pdf

attractions.name: Ngoc Son Temple
attractions.description: Historic temple on small island in Hoan Kiem Lake, connected by red Huc Bridge, dedicated to scholars and generals

attractions.name: Dong Xuan Market
attractions.description: Hanoi's largest traditional market with textiles, souvenirs, local snacks and household goods
source_files: Vietnam/Vietnam- All Inclusive Guide- Vishnu Prasad.pdf

attractions.name: Thang Long Water Puppet Theatre
attractions.description: Uniquely Vietnamese art form bringing folk tales to life through puppets dancing on water with live traditional music

attractions.name: Mega Grand World Hanoi
attractions.description: Large-scale entertainment complex with European-inspired architecture, waterfront promenades, themed zones including The Venice, K-Town, and Grand Voyage

attractions.name: VinKE & Vinpearl Aquarium Times City
attractions.description: Family-friendly entertainment complex with interactive play zones, educational role-play activities, and one of Vietnam's largest aquariums

attractions.name: Ba Dinh Square
attractions.description: Center of a large complex of historical and cultural sites with Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, One Pillar Pagoda, and Presidential Palace

attractions.name: Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum
attractions.description: Historical mausoleum at Ba Dinh Square
source_files: Vietnam/Vietnam- All Inclusive Guide- Vishnu Prasad.pdf

attractions.name: One Pillar Pagoda
attractions.description: Historic pagoda at Ba Dinh Square
source_files: Vietnam/Vietnam- All Inclusive Guide- Vishnu Prasad.pdf

attractions.name: Presidential Palace
attractions.description: Can only be viewed from outside

attractions.name: Train Street
attractions.description: Street where train passes by at 3:30 pm, view from cafes

attractions.name: Dong Kinh Nghia Thuc Square
attractions.description: Pedestrian weekend night market/fair

attractions.name: Ngoc Sun Temple
attractions.description: Temple at Hoan Kiem lake
attractions.entry_fee: 30,000 VND for adults, free for children below 15

attractions.name: Thang Long Theatre Water Puppet Show
attractions.description: Unique shows depicting Vietnamese folktales and legends using puppets manipulated in a pool of water
attractions.entry_fee: Best seats cost 200K VND per person

attractions.name: Ngoc Sun Temple at Hoan Kiem Lake
attractions.description: Temple at Hoan Kiem lake
attractions.entry_fee: 30,000 VND (Rs. 100) for adults, free for children below 15

attractions.name: Cau the Huc Bridge
attractions.description: Bridge that is lit up in the evening, opposite the theatre

attractions.name: Mega Grand World
attractions.description: A vibrant new entertainment complex inspired by European canal towns, featuring colorful architecture, boutique shopping streets, restaurants, cafés, and evening cultural performances
attractions.entry_fee: Free entry (shopping, dining and shows are extra)

attractions.name: Cau Bau (Incense Village)
attractions.description: Traditional incense village

attractions.name: Dong kinh ngia Tucs Square
attractions.description: Pedestrian weekend night market/fair

attractions.name: Ta Hien Beer Street
attractions.description: Beer street with pedestrian weekend night market around Hoan Kiem lake

attractions.name: Halong Bay
attractions.description: Day trip cruise destination

attractions.name: St Joseph's
attractions.description: Christmas Mass location

attractions.name: Thang Long Theatre
attractions.description: Water puppet shows depicting Vietnamese folktales and legends
attractions.hours: Shows at various times including 6:30 pm

attractions.name: St. Joseph's Cathedral
attractions.description: Cathedral near Hoan Kiem Lake

attractions.name: Hanoi Old Quarter Night Market
attractions.description: Night market stretching from Hang Dao Street to Dong Xuan Market, total length about 3 kilometers

attractions.name: Hoan Kiem Lake Hanoi
attractions.description: Peaceful lake at the heart of Hanoi where locals gather for evening walks, tai chi, and quiet conversations

attractions.name: Ngoc Son Temple Hanoi
attractions.description: Small temple connected by striking red bridge, sitting on an island within Hoan Kiem Lake

attractions.name: Temple of Literature Hanoi
attractions.description: Vietnam's first university, set within peaceful courtyards and traditional architecture

attractions.name: Water Puppet show at Thang Long Theatre
attractions.description: Unique shows depict Vietnamese folktales and legends using puppets manipulated in a pool of water
attractions.entry_fee: 200K VND (~Rs. 700) per person for best seats
